question.text: Intraday Crystallized Mark to Market Losses (ICMTM) are computed for trades that are:

answer.text: Executed and closed out on the same trading day

explanation.text: **The Logic:** ICMTM shall be computed for all trades subject to upfront margining which are executed and closed out on the same trading day (day trades). **The Trap:** ICMTM applies to intraday squared-off positions, not overnight positions which are covered by regular MTM. **Cross-Exam Context:** ICMTM was introduced to capture intraday losses that would otherwise be missed in end-of-day MTM calculation. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** ICMTM prevents traders from booking intraday losses that escape end-of-day margin calculations.
